differential_diagnoses: Adrenocortical carcinoma with ectopic Cushing's syndrome
next_steps: Initiate empiric therapy for bacterial meningitis including Listeria (vancomycin, ceftriaxone, ampicillin)
Initiate empiric anti-tuberculous therapy (RIPE regimen) and corticosteroids given clinical/CSF evidence
Perform biochemical workup for adrenal hyperfunction (serum/urine cortisol, plasma metanephrines, ACTH)
Submit CSF for comprehensive infectious panel (TB PCR/AFB culture, fungal culture, cryptococcal antigen, VZV/HSV PCR)
Manage elevated intracranial pressure (e.g., serial LPs or ventriculostomy if clinically indicated)
Perform systemic imaging reassessment (e.g., PET/CT) to screen for occult malignancy beyond the adrenal gland
